Provenance.drafts: 8-20 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP across escalation rounds; curated hard per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: round 2 escalation (8 candidates across 2 rounds); c2 -- single hulking figure, molten-cracked head/chest, no held props/pedestal/wings. Round 1 drew winged demons, armored lich-knights holding weapons, and a concept sheet; curation accepted a bulkier silhouette than the spec's literal 'gaunt' in exchange for a clean single-subject readable silhouette after repeated off-spec/concept-sheet draws
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5) -- lit Mine world sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true
